title: R2.4A: Remove Hard-coded Paths
description:
Remediation Task - High Priority

Issue: Scripts contain hard-coded file paths

Required Implementation:
- Identify all hard-coded paths in scripts
- Replace with parameterized configuration
- Add path validation functions
- Document path configuration requirements

Target: 4 hours
Owner: code-puppy

Acceptance Criteria:
- No hard-coded paths remain
- Configuration-based path management
- Validation prevents invalid paths
- Cross-platform compatibility verified

Created by: bloodhound-802672
Phase: Phase 2 Remediation Sprint (Day 1 of 7)

title: Phase 4: User Property Audit & Onboarding Script
description: Script to: 1) Audit existing deltacrownext users Azure AD properties (companyName, jobTitle, department), 2) Bulk-update missing properties for DCE users, 3) Verify dynamic group membership after property update, 4) Verify site access. Ref: ADR-003 existing user onboarding section.

title: Presentation: Update GitHub Pages with migration & architecture
description: Updated presentation/index.html with 10 sections: status dashboard, HTTHQ problem visualization, architecture diagram, migration map, user experience flow, progress dashboard, deployment flow, vision cascade. Same design system.

title: P5: Create Exchange Quick-Start Guide
description: Create phase3-week2/EXCHANGE-QUICKSTART.md that Tyler can follow. Include: prerequisites checklist (modules, admin access, Pax8/CSP, licensed user), verification command (5.1 -VerifyOnly), full deployment command, what to do if Exchange isn't active yet (reference templates/email-megan-csp-request.md), post-deployment verification steps, troubleshooting (cross-tenant auth, license not provisioned, Exchange not activated). Keep it concise and actionable.

title: P5: Quality/Security Review of 5.1-Exchange-Setup.ps1
description: Review the main Exchange setup script for: correct Exchange Online cmdlet usage (New-DynamicDistributionGroup, New-Mailbox -Shared, Add-RecipientPermission, Add-MailboxPermission, Set-MailboxAutoReplyConfiguration), valid OPATH RecipientFilter syntax for DDGs, idempotency (safe to re-run), connection cleanup in finally block, WhatIf/ShouldProcess correctness, verification sweep logic. Script at phase3-week2/scripts/5.1-Exchange-Setup.ps1
notes: CHANGES_REQUESTED by shepherd-4dfd14: One blocking issue - [switch]$WhatIf on line 24 conflicts with [CmdletBinding(SupportsShouldProcess)] which already provides -WhatIf. This can cause -WhatIf to silently not work. Remove line 24. Also 2 SHOULD FIX (Auth module reuse, legacy Get-PSSession check, no Pester tests) and 4 CONSIDER items (config dedup, DDG verification filtering, code DRY with 3.5, polling instead of Start-Sleep).

title: P5: Review Auth Module Cross-Tenant Changes
description: Review the Connect-DeltaCrownExchange changes in DeltaCrown.Auth.psm1 for: correct splatting approach for Connect-ExchangeOnline, -Organization parameter works with cross-tenant guest admin accounts, change doesn't break non-cross-tenant scenarios (when ExchangeOrganization is null/empty). File at phase2-week1/modules/DeltaCrown.Auth.psm1

comments.author: Tyler Granlund
comments.text: Shepherd review: APPROVED. Cross-tenant splatting correct, backward compat preserved, all 50 tests pass.

title: P5: Integration Consistency Check
description: Check consistency across all Phase 5 files: verify group names in 5.1 match actual Azure AD groups (DCE-AllStaff, DCE-Managers, DCE-Stylists, DCE-External - NOT SG-DCE-*), verify 3.5 script consistent with 5.1, DEPLOYMENT-STATUS.md accuracy, check for remaining deltacrown.com.au typos in scripts (found in 3.7, 3.6, 3.0, SITE-STRUCTURE-DIAGRAM, tests, etc), check httbrands.com references in Exchange code (found dceinfo@httbrands.com in deploy-phase3-complete.ps1:210)

title: BUG: SG-DCE-* group names in scripts don't match actual DCE-* Azure AD groups
description: Actual Azure AD groups are: DCE-AllStaff, DCE-Managers, DCE-Stylists, DCE-External (no SG- prefix). But these scripts still reference SG-DCE-* names: 3.2-Teams-Provisioning.ps1 (SG-DCE-Leadership, SG-DCE-AllStaff), 3.3-Security-Hardening.ps1 (SG-DCE-AllStaff, SG-DCE-Leadership, SG-DCE-Marketing), 3.7-Phase3-Verification.ps1 (SG-DCE-AllStaff, SG-DCE-Leadership, SG-DCE-Marketing), deploy-phase3-complete.ps1 (SG-DCE-AllStaff, SG-DCE-Leadership, SG-DCE-Managers), DeltaCrown.Config.psd1 (SG-DCE-AllStaff, SG-DCE-Leadership). These will fail when scripts try to resolve groups that don't exist.
close_reason: Renamed all group refs to prefix-free names across 45 files. rename-groups.ps1 created. Tests pass.

title: BUG: deltacrown.com.au typo in 7+ executable scripts — will fail at runtime
description: The domain deltacrown.com.au does not exist — the correct domain is deltacrown.com. Found in executable scripts that WILL FAIL: 3.0-Master-Phase3.ps1 (line 247), 3.6-Template-Export.ps1 (line 70), 3.7-Phase3-Verification.ps1 (lines 99, 441). Also in docs/specs: SITE-STRUCTURE-DIAGRAM.md, TEAMS-CONFIGURATION-SPEC.md, SCRIPT-SPECIFICATIONS.md, ADR-001, ADR-002, DLP spec. And in tests: test_adr_002_phase3_sites_teams.py (lines 75-77, 295-298). Fix all .com.au references to .com.
close_reason: Fixed all 37 .com.au occurrences across 12 files. Tests pass.

title: Research Microsoft 365 / Entra external collaboration realities for DeltaSetup planning
close_reason: Completed Microsoft 365/Entra external collaboration research and saved structured findings under research/entra-external-collaboration/

title: Research additional M365/Entra cross-tenant topics from Microsoft Learn
Add architecture fitness tests for cross-tenant access anti-patterns
ADR-004: Cross-tenant collaboration and SharePoint access overlay
description: Create a formal architecture decision record covering single-tenant baseline vs cross-tenant collaboration overlay, B2B collaboration vs cross-tenant sync decision criteria, anti-pattern prohibition on resource-tenant dynamic-group inbound gating, and required order of operations for partner onboarding.

title: Plan DCE role-and-location onboarding model with Tyler cross-tenant test user
description: Define the simplest reusable onboarding flow for Delta Crown that starts with role and owned-location labeling, maps those labels to dynamic groups and resource access, and includes Tyler's HTT Brands account as the first cross-tenant test user for validating the right SharePoint/Teams/apps experience before scaling to other tenants.

title: Define DCE attribute-to-group-to-resource mapping matrix
description: Translate the new DCE role and location onboarding model into a concrete mapping matrix from identity attributes to dynamic groups to SharePoint, Teams, mailbox, and app access, including Tyler's HTT cross-tenant pilot path and implementation follow-ups for scripts.

title: Implement DCE functional and location group automation
description: Update the DeltaSetup automation to support the new DCE attribute-to-group-to-resource model by adding functional groups, location groups, pilot group handling, and verification updates across the dynamic-groups, hardening, and verification scripts.

title: Pre-fill DCE onboarding matrices with current known users and pilot mapping
description: Use the current repository evidence to pre-populate the DCE user access matrix and group-resource mapping template with known users, baseline role assumptions, initial location codes, and Tyler's HTT cross-tenant pilot mapping so Tyler can validate access and iterate from a concrete starting point.

title: Create Tyler cross-tenant pilot execution checklist
description: Create a step-by-step execution checklist for Tyler's HTT Brands cross-tenant pilot into the Delta Crown tenant, covering object creation/sync validation, identity labeling, group membership checks, SharePoint/Teams/mailbox/app tests, and negative-access verification so the real end-user experience can be observed first hand.

title: Approve PnP device login and execute live SPO hardening/migration
description: Live SharePoint hardening and Phase 4 document migration could not be completed by agent because PnP DeviceLogin requires Tyler to approve browser/device-code authentication. Security hardening script has been patched for PnP.PowerShell 3.x ClientId requirement. Next run: approve device codes, run deploy-security-hardening.ps1, then run Phase 4 migration dry-run and execution.
notes:
code-puppy-bf0453: Source auth fixed; label removed.
code-puppy-bf0453: Closed because document migration is skipped/not planned; security hardening is complete.

title: Register or consent PnP app for HTT Brands source migration
description: Phase 4 migration cannot read source site https://httbrands.sharepoint.com/sites/HTTHQ until HTT Brands has a valid PnP.PowerShell app/client auth path. Tested legacy/no-client DeviceLogin: invalid_client. Tested historical source client 5d0381fe-0e8a-4656-80f3-fd91839667f1: AADSTS700016 app not found/not consented in Head to Toe Brands. Browser -Interactive timed out in agent shell. Need register/consent a PnP Entra app in HTT Brands and provide its client ID via -SourceClientId or HTT_PNP_CLIENT_ID, then rerun 4.3-Document-Migration.ps1.
close_reason: Fixed: registered HTT Brands delegated PnP app and verified source migration dry-run

title: Delete unused HTT Brands PnP migration app
description: Cleanup after migration was skipped. Delete unused HTT Brands Entra app registration DeltaSetup-HTT-SourceMigration-PnP / client ID 3657525b-b24a-43bc-9510-cbdd375da6e5. Agent attempted Graph deletion with Application.ReadWrite.All device code but auth timed out before approval. This app is not needed because no document migration will be performed.
close_reason: Deleted unused HTT Brands Entra app DeltaSetup-HTT-SourceMigration-PnP / 3657525b-b24a-43bc-9510-cbdd375da6e5; verified app no longer exists.

title: Verify DCE user metadata and Teams channel state
description: Follow-up from live Graph current-state export. AllStaff resolves to six users because only six users currently have companyName=Delta Crown Extensions. Managers/Stylists/Marketing/External dynamic groups exist but resolve no members until jobTitle/department/userType metadata is populated. Graph Team lookup returned zero Teams team/channel objects for Delta Crown Operations even though the Microsoft 365 group exists; verify Teams activation/channels before launch materials promise channel names.
notes: Identity inventory confirmed metadata gaps: 89 users, companyName populated for 6, department 45, jobTitle 44, officeLocation 16, employeeType 0. AllStaff resolves to 6; Managers/Marketing/Stylists dynamic groups resolve to 0. Use docs/delta-crown-identity-inventory-summary.md as evidence.
close_reason: Completed read-only metadata and Teams-state verification. Confirmed metadata gaps/dynamic group counts and DCE Operations group backing object. Direct Teams/channel endpoints return 403 because current delegated context lacks valid Office/Teams license in DCE; documented access requirement for Teams inventory.

title: Prepare DCE Microsoft 365 team showcase readiness checklist
description: Create and complete a final readiness checklist before showing the Delta Crown Microsoft 365 operating model to the team. Include: align on clean generic resource names; complete Master DCE/Brand Resources audit; verify user metadata; verify Teams/channel state; confirm SharePoint site/list readiness; confirm DLP/security posture; smoke-test live GitHub Pages root and Ops View; prepare talk track/demo flow; identify any tenant tasks that must be done before stakeholder showcase.
close_reason: Updated team showcase readiness checklist with current inventory evidence, metadata/dynamic group gaps, SharePoint/ClientServices findings, duplicate group risks, Teams access blocker, security policy confirmation, go/no-go guidance, and final signoff gates. No live tenant changes required.

title: Audit HTTHQ Master DCE folder structure and permissions
description: Inventory the existing HTTHQ Shared Documents/Master DCE folder: top-level folders, item counts, modified metadata, unique permissions, role assignments, sharing links where available, and current access principals. Use the output to map each folder into Delta Crown tenant pillar resources and decide what should stay in httbrands vs move/replicate into deltacrown.
close_reason: Completed HTTHQ Master DCE top-level folder and permission audit. Findings documented in docs/master-dce-audit-findings.md; raw permission CSV remains local-only.

title: Repurpose ClientServices artifacts to Brand Resources model
description: Replace historical ClientServices/client-record assumptions in docs, templates, tests, and provisioning configs with the new Brand Resources / Master DCE resource model after tenant decisions are confirmed. Avoid changing production scripts blindly until actual SharePoint site/list state is verified.
close_reason: Created docs/clientservices-to-brand-resources-transition-plan.md and added current-readiness warnings to legacy deployment docs. Plan defines ordered repo/tenant transition from ClientServices assumptions to Brand Resources with metadata-only inventory and no live-change guardrails.

title: Inventory all Delta Crown tenant resources and policies
description: Create a full inventory of everything created/configured in the Delta Crown tenant: Conditional Access policies, security groups, Microsoft 365 groups, dynamic group rules, SharePoint sites/libraries/lists, Teams/channels, distribution lists, shared mailboxes, aliases, DLP/sensitivity/governance policies, app registrations/enterprise apps, licenses, and any cross-tenant/corporate access configuration. Output should map each resource to purpose, owner, access model, dependency, and showcase/readiness status.
notes: Created docs/delta-crown-tenant-inventory-status.md as the umbrella inventory dashboard. Inventory is substantially complete for accessible identity, SharePoint, Exchange, security singleton policy, duplicate group, and metadata scopes. Full DeltaSetup-124 remains blocked by Teams/channel workload reads: Graph and MicrosoftTeams return 403/license/read-context errors, tracked by DeltaSetup-151 and DeltaSetup-134.

title: Freeze readiness scope and public narrative
description: Confirm generic user-facing names, constraints, non-goals, do-not-change list, and create/update docs/team-showcase-readiness-checklist.md. Must distinguish public showcase, intended model, live tenant audit pending, and production cleanup.
close_reason: Completed readiness scope checklist in docs/team-showcase-readiness-checklist.md with generic names, no-client-record scope, demo safety, and do-not-change guardrails.

title: Prepare Master DCE audit runbook
description: Document auth prerequisites, commands, required roles, expected outputs, and no-change guardrails for phase4-migration/scripts/audit-master-dce.ps1. No tenant writes, no file copy/move/delete, no permission changes.
close_reason: Completed Master DCE audit runbook in docs/master-dce-audit-runbook.md and hardened audit script default output/source verification.

title: Execute Master DCE audit with interactive auth
description: Run phase4-migration/scripts/audit-master-dce.ps1 against HTTHQ Shared Documents/Master DCE during a Tyler-supervised auth window. Raw outputs default to .local/reports/master-dce/ and must remain local unless reviewed/redacted and explicitly approved. No tenant writes, no file copy/move/delete, no permission changes. Currently blocked by approved PnP/Entra app registration configuration issue DeltaSetup-141.
notes:
Auth window attempted. Interactive login, DeviceLogin, and OSLogin all failed with AADSTS500113: No reply address is registered for the application. This is an Entra/PnP app registration blocker, not a user credential issue. Blocked by DeltaSetup-141. No tenant writes were performed and no raw audit outputs were generated.
Audit completed successfully using existing HTT Azure CLI login and phase4-migration/scripts/audit_master_dce_graph.py. Raw outputs generated locally under .local/reports/master-dce/: master-dce-folder-inventory.csv, master-dce-permissions.csv, master-dce-summary.md. Commit-safe summary added at docs/master-dce-audit-findings.md. No tenant writes, file operations, or permission changes were performed.
close_reason: Executed Master DCE top-level audit via Azure CLI Graph fallback. Raw outputs are local-only under .local/reports/master-dce/ and safe findings are committed in docs/master-dce-audit-findings.md.

title: Create Master DCE resource map
description: Use Master DCE audit outputs to create docs/master-dce-resource-map.md. Classify each source folder into Operations, Brand Resources, Marketing, Docs, Training, Leadership-restricted, Corporate Reference/Shortcut, Archive, or Needs Owner Review.
close_reason: Created docs/master-dce-resource-map.md from completed Master DCE audit findings, classifying every top-level source item into target resource lanes with owner-review and no-change guardrails.

title: Define Brand Resources target model
description: Create docs/brand-resources-target-model.md defining purpose, audience, ownership, access model, content categories, what belongs, what does not belong, and relationship to Operations, Marketing, Docs, Training, Leadership, and corporate references.
close_reason: Created docs/brand-resources-target-model.md defining purpose, audience, ownership, access model, content categories, exclusions, relationships to other lanes, implementation options, and migration readiness gates.

title: Create legacy ClientServices cleanup register
description: Create docs/legacy-clientservices-cleanup-register.md listing legacy ClientServices/client-record artifacts, current location, proposed future state, risk, owner approval needed, whether repo-only or tenant-impacting, and safe-to-change status.
close_reason: Created docs/legacy-clientservices-cleanup-register.md listing repo and live-tenant ClientServices/client-record artifacts, risks, proposed future states, approval gates, and safe-to-change status.

title: Prepare tenant inventory runbook and access matrix
description: Document required read-only roles/scopes and inventory commands for identity, groups, SharePoint, Teams, Exchange, security/Conditional Access/DLP/apps, and licenses. Produce docs/tenant-inventory-access-matrix.md.
close_reason: Completed tenant inventory access matrix in docs/tenant-inventory-access-matrix.md with read-only scopes, auth windows, allowlist/denylist, and local-only raw output handling.

title: Inventory identity users groups and roles
description: Using read-only Graph/Entra access, inventory tenant users, metadata completeness, groups, dynamic membership rules, owners, and group memberships. Feed consolidated tenant inventory.
close_reason: Completed read-only Delta Crown identity/group/role inventory via Graph. Raw outputs are local-only under .local/reports/tenant-inventory/identity; committed safe summary in docs/delta-crown-identity-inventory-summary.md and script in phase4-migration/scripts/inventory_delta_crown_identity_graph.py.

title: Inventory SharePoint and OneDrive resources
description: Using read-only SharePoint/PnP access, inventory sites, URLs, display titles, owners, hub associations, libraries, lists, sharing settings, unique permissions, and legacy ClientServices/Brand Resources state.
notes: Completed Graph-accessible SharePoint inventory of known Delta Crown paths and group-connected root sites. Tenant-wide site search returned accessDenied and SharePoint REST returned 401 invalid_request, so enhanced admin/PnP details are tracked separately by DeltaSetup-144. Safe summary: docs/delta-crown-sharepoint-inventory-summary.md. Raw outputs: .local/reports/tenant-inventory/sharepoint/.
close_reason: Completed read-only Graph-accessible SharePoint inventory for known Delta Crown paths and group-connected root sites. Safe summary committed in docs/delta-crown-sharepoint-inventory-summary.md; raw outputs local-only. Enhanced SharePoint admin/PnP permissions/sharing inventory split to DeltaSetup-144 due Graph/search/REST limitations.

title: Inventory Teams and channels
description: Using read-only Teams/Graph access, inventory Teams, channels, private/shared channels, owners, members, tabs/apps, connected SharePoint folders, and verify Operations group/channel state.
notes: Attempted MicrosoftTeams PowerShell after DeltaSetup-120. Connect-MicrosoftTeams succeeded, but Get-Team -GroupId 03255d50-a52d-4b1f-a0f6-37379cc13a35 failed with Forbidden in /v1.0/teams/ endpoint. Graph Teams endpoints also return 403 license errors. Teams inventory requires licensed Teams-readable context; tracked by DeltaSetup-151.

title: Inventory Exchange mail resources
description: Using read-only Exchange access, inventory accepted domains, user mailboxes, shared mailboxes, distribution lists, aliases, Send As/Full Access permissions, and mail flow/routing rules if any.
close_reason: Completed read-only Exchange Online inventory using delegated organization mode. Raw outputs remain local-only under .local/reports/tenant-inventory/exchange; committed safe summary and read-only script. Added fail-closed accepted-domain validation after non-delegated connection returned wrong tenant context.

title: Inventory security policies apps and licenses
description: Using read-only Graph/Entra/Purview/admin access where available, inventory Conditional Access policies, DLP/sensitivity/governance policies, app registrations, enterprise apps, credentials/expirations, admin consent, licenses, and tenant sharing posture.
notes: Completed Graph-accessible security/apps/licenses inventory. Found 2 SKUs, 6 licensed users, 3 app registrations, 204 service principals, 13 OAuth2 grants, 3 enabled CA policies, 1 named location, 4 app password credentials. Graph denied security defaults/auth methods/admin consent policy reads. Purview DLP/labels require enhanced compliance inventory tracked by DeltaSetup-146. Safe summary: docs/delta-crown-security-apps-licenses-inventory-summary.md.
close_reason: Completed read-only Graph-accessible security/apps/licenses inventory. Raw outputs remain local-only; committed safe summary and script. Filed follow-ups for TEMP app review, enhanced Purview DLP/labels inventory, and inaccessible singleton policy reads.

title: Consolidate tenant inventory report
description: Consolidate identity, SharePoint, Teams, Exchange, security/apps/licenses outputs into docs/delta-crown-tenant-inventory-report.md and reports/delta-crown-tenant-inventory.csv with purpose, owner, access model, dependencies, status, and showcase readiness.

title: Analyze public showcase vs live tenant gaps
description: Create docs/showcase-vs-tenant-gap-analysis.md comparing public showcase claims/names to live tenant evidence. Classify each item as Verified, Partially Verified, Not Present, Requires Tenant Change, Requires Stakeholder Decision, or Out of Scope.

title: Prepare team showcase readiness package
description: Create final showcase package: docs/team-showcase-runbook.md, docs/team-showcase-faq.md, docs/team-showcase-scorecard.md, and docs/team-showcase-demo-script.md. Must avoid overpromising and use generic user-facing names.

title: Create production cleanup roadmap and backlog
description: Create docs/production-cleanup-roadmap.md and backlog items from audit/inventory/gap findings. No live cleanup in this issue; only approved roadmap with owner, risk, rollback/validation, dependencies, and approval gates.

title: Configure approved PnP delegated auth app for HTTHQ Master DCE audit
description: PnP.PowerShell delegated auth for HTTHQ Master DCE audit is blocked by AADSTS500113: No reply address is registered for the application. Configure or identify an approved PnP/Entra app registration for httbrands.onmicrosoft.com with read-only delegated SharePoint access and a valid redirect URI/device-code compatible configuration. Do not grant write scopes. Do not run tenant writes.
acceptance_criteria: Approved client ID is documented outside secrets; redirect/device/OS login path succeeds; requested scopes are read-only; audit script can connect to https://httbrands.sharepoint.com/sites/HTTHQ and pass source-context verification.
notes: Observed during DeltaSetup-127 auth window. Interactive, DeviceLogin, and OSLogin all hit AADSTS500113. Request IDs observed in browser screenshots: 017d4f0a-b701-408b-ac64-115e354b1b00 and 5f2f2199-42eb-49a0-848f-6c5405af3e00. Correlation IDs: 84807415-0a5f-476d-bbdf-d88e3d4023b5 and 2e2a464a-2da9-4eae-ba5e-d0ec48d32828.
close_reason: Superseded for this audit by existing HTT Azure CLI Graph authentication. PnP app registration remains non-working with AADSTS500113, but the Master DCE audit no longer requires it. No app registration changes were made.

title: Review duplicate Delta Crown Extensions Microsoft 365 groups
description: Identity inventory found two Microsoft 365/Unified groups named Delta Crown Extensions with different mail addresses and 86 members each. Review dependencies during SharePoint/Teams inventory before any rename/delete/archive decision.
acceptance_criteria: SharePoint/Teams dependencies are checked; group purpose/owners are documented; owner-approved recommendation is added to production cleanup roadmap; no group is renamed/deleted without change approval.
notes: Completed live read-only Graph/SharePoint portion of duplicate group review. Both Delta Crown Extensions M365 groups are public, Teams-provisioned Unified groups with distinct SharePoint sites and identical member/owner sets (86/86 member overlap, 4/4 owner overlap). Documented recommendation: do not delete; after Teams visibility, identify canonical group, rename duplicate first, observe, then decide archive/delete. Remaining Teams/channel dependency check is blocked by DeltaSetup-151.

title: Decide owners for Delta Crown dynamic security groups
description: Identity inventory found dynamic security groups AllStaff, External, Managers, Marketing, and Stylists with zero owners. Decide business/technical owners after consolidated tenant inventory and before production cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Owner recommendations are documented for each dynamic group; changes are routed through production cleanup roadmap/change request; no owner assignments are made from inventory alone.

title: Run enhanced SharePoint admin/PnP inventory for permissions and sharing
description: Graph inventory completed known Delta Crown sites and group-connected sites, but tenant-wide site search and SharePoint REST/admin details were limited. Run enhanced SharePoint admin/PnP inventory to capture hub associations, site admins/owners, sharing settings, full list/library inventory, unique permissions, and external sharing posture without reading list items/file contents.
acceptance_criteria: Enhanced inventory captures site owners/admins, hub associations, sharing settings, full library/list names, permission summaries/unique permission indicators, and external sharing posture; client-record-style contents are not opened/exported; raw outputs remain local/redacted; findings feed consolidated tenant inventory.
close_reason: Completed enhanced read-only SharePoint/PnP inventory. Captured tenant sites, sharing capability, hub IDs, list/library names and item counts, unique permission flags, site groups/member counts, and web role summaries. Raw outputs local-only; committed safe summary and script.

title: Review DeltaCrown TeamsProvisioner TEMP app registration
description: Security/apps inventory found app registration DeltaCrown-TeamsProvisioner-TEMP with three expired password credentials. Review dependencies and owner intent before any deletion/credential cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: App purpose and dependencies are documented; expired credentials are reviewed; owner-approved cleanup recommendation is added to production cleanup roadmap; no app/credential changes are made from inventory alone.

title: Run enhanced Purview compliance inventory for DLP and sensitivity labels
description: Graph security/apps/licenses inventory did not capture Purview DLP policies or sensitivity labels. Run read-only Compliance/Purview inventory for DLP policies/rules, sensitivity labels, label policies, and policy modes without changing tenant settings.
acceptance_criteria: DLP policies/rules, sensitivity labels, label policies, policy modes, and read limitations are documented; raw outputs remain local/redacted; findings feed consolidated tenant inventory; no compliance policies are changed.
notes: Completed read-only Purview/Compliance inventory. Found 6 DLP policies, 8 DLP rules, 12 sensitivity labels, 1 label policy, 1 retention policy/rule, 0 inventory errors. DCE-Data-Protection and Corp-Data-Protection are in TestWithNotifications; External-Sharing-Block is Enable. Safe summary: docs/delta-crown-compliance-inventory-summary.md.
close_reason: Completed read-only delegated Purview/Compliance inventory for DLP policies/rules, sensitivity labels, label policies, and retention policies/rules. Raw outputs remain local-only; committed safe summary and script. Filed follow-up for DLP policies in test mode.

title: Confirm security defaults authentication methods and admin consent policies
description: Graph inventory returned access denied for security defaults enforcement, authentication methods policy, and admin consent request policy. Re-run with sufficient read scopes/roles or document owner attestation.
acceptance_criteria: Security defaults, authentication methods policy, and admin consent request workflow state are confirmed via read-only evidence or explicit access limitation/owner attestation; no policy settings are changed.
close_reason: Confirmed security defaults, authentication methods policy, and admin consent request policy with read-only Microsoft Graph PowerShell. Security defaults disabled; admin consent request workflow disabled; authentication method states documented. Raw full policy JSON remains local-only.

title: Review Delta Crown DLP test mode policies
description: Compliance inventory found DCE-Data-Protection and Corp-Data-Protection DLP policies in TestWithNotifications mode. Review raw DLP rules and owner intent before enforcement/change decisions.
acceptance_criteria: DLP test-mode rationale, rule summary, owner decision, and enforcement review plan are documented in the production cleanup/readiness roadmap; no DLP policy mode or rule changes are made from inventory alone.

title: Capture detailed SharePoint list group and role inventory
description: Extend the enhanced SharePoint/PnP inventory to capture detailed list/library metadata, site group membership rows, web role assignments, and list/library role assignment summaries for risk-named or uniquely-permissioned lists without reading list items or file contents.
acceptance_criteria: Raw local outputs include list/library details, group member rows, web role assignment rows, and list/library role assignment rows; committed summary documents counts, ClientServices/risk artifacts, unique permission findings, access limitations, and no-content-read guardrails; no SharePoint changes are made.
close_reason: Extended enhanced SharePoint/PnP inventory to include detailed site group member rows and list/library role assignment rows for risk-named or uniquely-permissioned lists. Reran inventory, updated safe summary with ClientServices list/group/role detail, and kept raw member/role evidence local-only.

title: Decide Brand Assets vs Brand Resources SharePoint model
description: Enhanced SharePoint/PnP inventory found a DCE Marketing library named Brand Assets but no exact Brand Resources site/list/library. Decide whether Brand Assets satisfies the Brand Resources target model, should be renamed, or should be complemented by a separate approved resource area.
acceptance_criteria: Decision records current Brand Assets evidence, target naming/model, owner approval, and implementation/no-change recommendation; no SharePoint rename/create/delete occurs from inventory alone.

title: Provide licensed Teams-readable context for DCE Teams inventory
description: Teams inventory is blocked because Graph Teams endpoints return 403 license errors and MicrosoftTeams PowerShell Get-Team returns Forbidden in /v1.0/teams/ endpoint for the current delegated context. Provide or confirm a licensed Teams-readable DCE user/admin context, or document owner-attested Teams/channel state if access cannot be granted.
acceptance_criteria: A Teams-readable context can run read-only Get-Team/Get-TeamChannel or equivalent Graph reads for the DCE Operations team; or an explicit owner attestation documents Teams/channel state and access limitation. No Teams changes are made.
notes: Created docs/teams-inventory-access-request.md documenting the exact Teams read blocker, test commands, required licensed Teams-readable context, owner-attestation fallback, and read-only guardrails. Waiting on Tyler/admin action to provide licensed Teams-readable DCE context or attestation.

title: Run approved PnP auth window for Phase 3 template export
description: Phase 3 template capture is blocked because phase3-week2/scripts/3.6-Template-Export.ps1 requires interactive PnP authentication to export live SharePoint PnP templates and tenant theme. Remaining Teams permissions/security verification cannot be completed until licensed Teams-readable context is available via DeltaSetup-151.

title: SEC-AUDIT-003: Phase 3 Auth & Permission Model Security Audit
QA: 3.7 verification report JSON schema undefined — no CI/CD contract
SEC-003-F1: Eliminate direct Connect-PnPOnline/MgGraph calls — route all auth through DeltaCrown.Auth module
description: 17 direct Connect-PnPOnline -Interactive and 4 direct Connect-MgGraph calls bypass the centralized auth module, removing production guardrails, retry logic, and audit trails. Replace all with Connect-DeltaCrownSharePoint/Connect-DeltaCrownGraph. Affects: 3.0, 3.1, 3.2, 3.3, 3.6, 3.7. See SEC-AUDIT-003 Finding 1.

title: SEC-003-F2: Fix 3.3-Security-Hardening connect/disconnect churn — single connection per site
description: 3.3 connects and disconnects 3 times per site (Set-DCEUniquePermissions, Remove-DCEForbiddenGroups, Set-DCEPermissionMatrix), causing 15-18 interactive auth prompts for 5-6 sites. Restructure to connect once per site, perform all operations, then disconnect. See SEC-AUDIT-003 Finding 2.

title: SEC-003-F4: Add session broker to Master Orchestrator (3.0) for single-auth-per-API
description: 3.0-Master-Phase3.ps1 does not import DeltaCrown.Auth.psm1 and cannot share auth sessions with sub-scripts. Each sub-script independently authenticates, producing 52-72 total prompts per full run. Implement a session broker that authenticates once per API (PnP, Graph, EXO, IPPS) and passes auth context to sub-scripts. See SEC-AUDIT-003 Finding 4.

title: SEC-003-F6: Add Connect-DeltaCrownExchange and Connect-DeltaCrownIPPS to auth module
description: Exchange Online and IPPS/SCC sessions (used by 3.4 and 3.5) have no auth module wrapper. They bypass production guardrails, have no retry logic, and cannot use service principal auth. Add Connect-DeltaCrownExchange and Connect-DeltaCrownIPPS functions to DeltaCrown.Auth.psm1 with the same environment checks, retry logic, and auth method support as the existing SharePoint/Graph wrappers. See SEC-AUDIT-003 Finding 6.

title: P3 BUG: 3.3 connect/disconnect thrashing — 15+ interactive auth prompts for 5 sites
P3: Add Pester unit tests for all Phase 3 scripts
ADR-003: HTTHQ Document Migration Strategy
description: Migration plan for moving Master DCE folder from httbrands.sharepoint.com/sites/HTTHQ to the new hub-and-spoke architecture on deltacrownext. Includes file-to-site mapping, phased migration approach (Option B), corporate document strategy, and user onboarding plan.
notes: code-puppy-bf0453: Closed because document migration is skipped/not planned; security hardening is complete.

title: Phase 4: Document Migration Script
description: Create PowerShell migration script that reads file-to-site mapping CSV, copies files preserving metadata/versions, logs operations, generates migration report. Depends on Phase 2+3 deployment. Ref: ADR-003 Phase C.
